evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Champion software engineering principles including TDD and CI/CD workflows

evidence.jd_authorship: Design horizontally scalable, cost-efficient, production-grade data solutions for handling massive datasets
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Act as technical lead for a squad, making architectural decisions and driving cross-squad collaboration
evidence.autonomy_level: making architectural decisions and driving cross-squad collaboration

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Champion software engineering principles including TDD and CI/CD workflows
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Multiple rigour signals (TDD, CI/CD, monitoring frameworks, production-grade solutions) with zero velocity signals present.
domain_risk_quote: Build data products leveraging location signals and audience attributes
domain_risk_reasoning: Adtech company context with user data, but no explicit language around compliance, regulatory, or financial reporting impact.
data_team_maturity_quote: Act as technical lead for a squad, making architectural decisions and driving cross-squad collaboration
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Implies existing team structure and production systems already in place, but no signals of multiple specialized sub-teams or greenfield infrastructure building.
jd_authorship_quote: Design horizontally scalable, cost-efficient, production-grade data solutions for handling massive datasets
jd_authorship_reasoning: Mostly specific technical bullets with scale numbers (multi-terabyte, massive datasets), named methodologies (TDD, CI/CD, monitoring frameworks), and domain-specific focus.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Act as technical lead for a squad, making architectural decisions and driving cross-squad collaboration
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: Role is framed around technical leadership, mentoring engineers, and architectural governance of the data function itself rather than serving external commercial, product, or finance stakeholders.
autonomy_level_quote: making architectural decisions and driving cross-squad collaboration
autonomy_level_reasoning: Decision-making authority, architectural ownership, and explicit direction-setting verbs (make, drive, establish, champion) position this as a strategic role that defines technical direction rather than executing scoped work.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Design horizontally scalable, cost-efficient, production-grade data solutions for handling massive datasets
ai_role_quote: Build data products leveraging location signals and audience attributes
ai_role_reasoning: Data product work described without AI tools or AI-enabling infrastructure.
testing_framing_quote: Champion software engineering principles including TDD and CI/CD workflows
testing_framing_reasoning: Candidate champions TDD, indicating ownership of quality and testing practices.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Design horizontally scalable, cost-efficient, production-grade data solutions for handling massive datasets
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Technical capability requirements described without operational risk, SLO, or compliance framing.
